saturation_verdict.rationale: New theme emergence rate has dropped to 1-2 per batch in final 5 batches. Core pain points (slice, confidence loss, embarrassment, distance loss) are being repeated with only variation in specific language. Hope themes (fitting transformation, draw bias success, swing speed reduction) are consistently validated across platforms.
saturation_verdict.recommendation: PROCEED TO LAYER 2 - Sufficient raw material for intelligence analysis
